{{Quote|After your ship is checked for all necessary permits and legitimacy of cargo, you will be allowed to continue on to your destination using navigational data provided by the Star Destroyer ''Revenge''.|The ''Watcher'', to the ''Arion Star''|<ref name="MilkRun" />}}
The '''''Revenge''''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in service at some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It once accompanied five [[Imperial Customs Frigate]]s traveling through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Their travel was interrupted, however, when an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] towed by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] into the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] was in forced it to emerge in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]]. While the pirate [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] subsequently prepared to escape into hyperspace, the ''Revenge'' proceeded to attack and eventually destroy their [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] later transmitted to the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]'' their current coordinates, enabling the freighter to continue on its journey that had likewise been interrupted by the pirates.

==Description==
The ''Revenge'' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that was a part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="MilkRun" /> Manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and measuring 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length,<ref name="DB" /> it had a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] outfitted with<ref name="MilkRun" /> a [[Communications tower/Legends|communications tower]]<ref name="EGVV" /> and at least one [[ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome]].<ref name="ShieldDome" /> The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was also equipped with an [[I-a2b solar ionization reactor/Legends|I-a2b solar ionization reactor]]<ref name="Solar" /> and three [[Destroyer-I ion engine/Legends|Destroyer-I ion engines]] and four [[Gemon-4 ion engine/Legends|Gemon-4 ion engines]].<ref name="EGVV" /> It carried a complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighters]].<ref name="MilkRun" />

==History==
At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Dates">"[[Milk Run]]" is set between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|V}}, which corresponds to the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the Galactic Empire, which included the ''Revenge'' and five [[Imperial Customs Frigate]]s—among them the [[Watcher (starship)|''Watcher'']]—was travelling in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The fleet was forced to revert to [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] over a celestial body after it encountered in its [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] towed there by a gang of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] as a trap. The [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] the pirates were using to board other captured [[Starship/Legends|starships]] immediately made preparations to escape into hyperspace while their [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] began to weakly defend them against the ''Revenge''.<ref name="MilkRun" />

{{RPG|"[[Milk Run]]"}}
The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was soon destroyed, and the Imperial vessels began to investigate the other ships that had been trapped by the pirates. The ''Watcher'' then hailed the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]''—which had been travelling from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tancon]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]]<ref name="EAOC Tancon">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tancon system/Legends|Tancon system]]</ref> to the neighboring<ref name="OuterRim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector's]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Soarin system]]. The Imperial vessel notified the freighter that, after the ''Watcher'' had carried out an inspection of the latter ship, the ''Revenge'' would transmit to the ''Arion Star'' their current coordinates so that the freighter could continue its journey. The ''Arion Star'' complied with the ''Watcher''{{'s}} instructions and eventually left for the Soarin [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="MilkRun" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Revenge'' appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure "[[Milk Run]]," which was written by [[Sterling Hershey]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> and was run by the [[RPGA]] Network at the [[1991]] [[Wikipedia:Gen Con|Gen Con]] gaming convention.<ref name="GenCon">{{WebCite|url=https://www.sterlinghershey.com/freelance|text=freelance — STERLING HERSHEY|work=[https://www.sterlinghershey.com/ STERLING HERSHEY]|archivedate=20240122010627}}</ref> This article assumes the scenario plays out as described.<ref name="MilkRun" />
